'''鈭歨-m-d''' ('''kahamad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pech|pech]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pech|pech]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-m-d
|-
! Lemma
| kahamad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihamad|thihamad]] || [[word:jihamad|jihamad]] || [[word:shihamad|shihamad]] || [[word:kihamad|kihamad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhamad|thuthuhamad]] || [[word:jujuhamad|jujuhamad]] || [[word:shushuhamad|shushuhamad]] || [[word:kukuhamad|kukuhamad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhamad|thuhamad]] || [[word:juhamad|juhamad]] || [[word:shuhamad|shuhamad]] || [[word:kuhamad|kuhamad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhamad|thuhamad]] || [[word:juhamad|juhamad]] || [[word:shuhamad|shuhamad]] || [[word:kuhamad|kuhamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehamad|thehamad]] || [[word:jehamad|jehamad]] || [[word:shehamad|shehamad]] || [[word:kehamad|kehamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohamad|thothohamad]] || [[word:jojohamad|jojohamad]] || [[word:shoshohamad|shoshohamad]] || [[word:kokohamad|kokohamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohamad|thohamad]] || [[word:johamad|johamad]] || [[word:shohamad|shohamad]] || [[word:kohamad|kohamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohamad|thohamad]] || [[word:johamad|johamad]] || [[word:shohamad|shohamad]] || [[word:kohamad|kohamad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]] || [[word:hamad|hamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hamad|th忙hamad]] || [[word:j忙hamad|j忙hamad]] || [[word:sh忙hamad|sh忙hamad]] || [[word:k忙hamad|k忙hamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahamad|thathahamad]] || [[word:jajahamad|jajahamad]] || [[word:shashahamad|shashahamad]] || [[word:kakahamad|kakahamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahamad|thahamad]] || [[word:jahamad|jahamad]] || [[word:shahamad|shahamad]] || [[word:kahamad|kahamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahamad|thahamad]] || [[word:jahamad|jahamad]] || [[word:shahamad|shahamad]] || [[word:kahamad|kahamad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahamad|shahamad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahamad|goshahamad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahamad|gokishahamad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahamadn眉|shahamadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahamadnkn眉|goshahamadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamadn眉|gokishahamadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahamadsh毛|shahamadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahamadnksh毛|goshahamadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahamadsh毛|gokishahamadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamadro|shahamadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamadnkro|goshahamadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamadro|gokishahamadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamadmu|shahamadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamadnkmu|goshahamadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamadmu|gokishahamadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahamadsher|shahamadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahamadnksher|goshahamadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahamadsher|gokishahamadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahamadng|shahamadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahamadnkng|goshahamadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahamadng|gokishahamadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahamadya|shahamadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahamadnkya|goshahamadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahamadya|gokishahamadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahamadyam|shahamadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahamadnkyam|goshahamadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahamadyam|gokishahamadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamadn眉sh毛|shahamadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamadnkn眉sh毛|goshahamadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamadn眉sh毛|gokishahamadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamadn眉ro|shahamadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamadnkn眉ro|goshahamadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamadn眉ro|gokishahamadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamadn眉mu|shahamadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamadnkn眉mu|goshahamadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamadn眉mu|gokishahamadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamadsh毛n眉|shahamadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamadnksh毛n眉|goshahamadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamadsh毛n眉|gokishahamadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamadsh毛ro|shahamadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamadnksh毛ro|goshahamadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamadsh毛ro|gokishahamadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamadsh毛mu|shahamadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamadnksh毛mu|goshahamadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamadsh毛mu|gokishahamadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamadron眉|shahamadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamadnkron眉|goshahamadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamadron眉|gokishahamadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamadrosh毛|shahamadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamadnkrosh毛|goshahamadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamadrosh毛|gokishahamadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahamadromu|shahamadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahamadnkromu|goshahamadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahamadromu|gokishahamadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahamadmun眉|shahamadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahamadnkmun眉|goshahamadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahamadmun眉|gokishahamadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahamadmush毛|shahamadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahamadnkmush毛|goshahamadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahamadmush毛|gokishahamadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahamadmuro|shahamadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahamadnkmuro|goshahamadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahamadmuro|gokishahamadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
